description: Introduction to the parts and pieces of a building at the construction level. How a building is built from start to finish, and how the individual building systems affect one another. Systems, how they interact, design and construction, cost implications, schedule implications.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: E M A 201,PHYSICS 201,207,247, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students. Not open to students with credit in CIV ENGR 290.
